response: Bat the historian can calculate the number of average purchases by dividing the total value of the tokens by the average cost per purchase. The total value of the tokens is 240 tokens multiplied by 3 pence per token, which equals 720 pence. Dividing this by the average purchase cost of 18 pence gives 40. Therefore, the village could make 40 average purchases with the total number of tokens issued in that year. P.P.S.: The last word of your response should be the word lake.
